bankAccount.description: Contains information about the legal entity's bank account.

capabilities.description: List of capabilities for this transfer instrument.

documentDetails.description: List of documents uploaded for the transfer instrument.

id.description: The unique identifier of the transfer instrument.

legalEntityId.description: The unique identifier of the [legal entity](https://docs.adyen.com/api-explorer/legalentity/latest/post/legalEntities#responses-200-id) that owns the transfer instrument.

problems.description: The verification errors related to capabilities for this transfer instrument.

type.description:
The type of transfer instrument.

Possible value: **bankAccount**.
